tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8) jednym wyrazem, przeksztalcajac wyrazy podane w ramce tak, aby otrzymac logiczny i gramatycznie poprawny tekst. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.title: GREAT INVENTIONS THAT CHANGED THE WORLD
tasks.text: Throughout history, brilliant 1.1. ________ have changed the way we live. The 1.2. ________ of the light bulb was truly 1.3. ________ because it allowed people to work and read after dark. Today, 1.4. ________ cars are becoming more popular as people look for cleaner ways to travel. The 1.5. ________ of smartphones has been 1.6. ________ fast in recent years. Modern technology brings constant 1.7. ________ to our daily lives, from better medicine to faster transport. Some people worry that robots will be 1.8. ________ for human workers, but most experts say technology will create new types of jobs instead. The future looks exciting for everyone.
